jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Barista
jsonLd.description:
Barista is actively seeking a talented and motivated Visual Merchandiser to join our dynamic team in Jaipur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Barista:
Barista is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Barista!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
